brief: Tensions escalate between US and Iran as new strikes are launched; domestic news includes Telstra outage, vet sector reforms, and Emmy surprises. AI research advances with world generation and prompt engineering tools.
news_summary: US military strikes Iran again as Trump threatens more; Telstra faces secondary outage affecting triple-zero calls; Emmys snub 'Amazing Race' while 'Love Island USA' host gets nod.
papers_summary: New papers present AlayaWorld for long-horizon video world generation and Prompt Coach for teaching prompt engineering, alongside tools for visualizing weather models and Chinese paintings.
